creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
The attached patch fixes "make test" with this module. Seems to be a slight bug
in the source. I've sent a request with this patch upstream. Thought I'd send
it your way in case you are interested.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-tpiconv

Port maintainer (rafan@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
